name: Zettelkasten (Slip-Box Method)
what_it_is: A knowledge system where ideas are stored as atomic notes linked by explicit connections - building a network of thought that compounds over time.
core_mechanic: Every idea gets its own atomic note. Each note links to related notes explicitly. Notes in own words, not copied. Over time, clusters surface non-obvious connections.
when_to_use: Learning across multiple domains and want insights to compound / Consuming a lot of input but retaining little / Long-term learning where the goal is synthesis
when_not_to_use: Short-term goal-specific learning / When your bottleneck is input not synthesis
ideaos_application: Agent 3 identifies the 3 most important atomic ideas in the input, writes them as Zettelkasten-style notes with explicit link prompts.
